params.name: Receiving the Envoy
params.description:
On Jun 23, 641 AD, Yan Liben presented his painting "Receiving the Envoy" to Emperor Taizong of Tang upon completing its creation.
Receiving the Envoy portrays Emperor Taizong of the Tang Dynasty meeting Lon Tongtsen, who was sent by Songtsan Gampo to escort Princess Wencheng to Tibet to become his queen. The painting is historically and artistically valuable, characterized by its elegant and vivid colors.
